name: @platform/storage-runtime
description: Object storage abstraction: file upload interface, presigned URL contracts, and storage bucket policy definitions.

readme.summary: Object storage abstraction: file upload interface, presigned URL contracts, and storage bucket policy definitions.
responsibilities: Define the typed file upload and retrieval interface
Declare presigned URL generation contracts for client-direct upload flows
Specify bucket policy and access control semantics
Decouple all platform and feature packages from specific cloud storage providers
nonResponsibilities: Does not implement cloud storage SDK calls (owned by adapters-object-storage)
Does not own content delivery or CDN configuration
Does not validate file content or enforce virus scanning
usage: Imported by feature packages to request presigned upload URLs
adapters-object-storage implements the upload interface against AWS S3 or equivalent
operationalNotes: Presigned URLs must have short TTLs — configure per-bucket maximums in the adapter
Bucket naming must follow the platform naming convention to enable IAM policy automation
